subcodes.first_line: O noble youth! Be thou a man of the world, for how often hath it come to pass that a single person representeth a thousand souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوانمرد جهانی مرد باش چه بسیار واقع که شخصی عبارت از هزار انسان هر نفسی که
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
